name: Ege Gubre Sanayi A.S.
summary: Ege G√É¬ºbre Sanayii A.S. produces and sells fertilizers in Turkey. The company offers compound fertilizers and organic solvents. It also provides various port services, including pier loading, unloading, and storage services, as well as operates tank farm facilities that provide petroleum products storage services. The company was founded in 1973 and is headquartered in Izmir, Turkey.
